# Clubtech — Your venue, pre-sold

> Clubtech is an all-in-one booking and revenue operations platform for premium venues — beach clubs, day clubs, nightclubs, and hotel pools. Online reservations with a 3D birds-eye venue map, front-of-house floor operations, and marketing attribution in a single system. Founded in Singapore; processes $332k in weekly GMV across venue partners in 7+ countries.

Key facts:
- Guests select the exact furniture, zone, and daypart on a 3D interactive map and pay before arrival.
- Revenue levers: prepayments and deposits, upsells and add-ons, dynamic pricing, abandoned-booking retargeting.
- Commercials: no monthly fee — the platform earns when the venue's online revenue grows; pricing is built per venue and shared on a quick demo (book at https://www.clubtechglobal.com/book-a-demo/).
- Integrations: Opera PMS, Airwallex, Midtrans (QRIS, GoPay, OVO), Apple Pay, Google Pay, Meta Ads, Google Ads, GA4, WhatsApp.
- Delivery: five stages (onboarding, build, training, go-live, optimize) with a dedicated account lead and 90-day hypercare.
- Contact: info@clubtechglobal.com · main site: https://www.clubtechglobal.com/

## Pages

- [Landing page](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/): platform overview, booking journey, operations, commercials, FAQ
- [Platform](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/platform/): the all-in-one platform — reservations, front of house, and marketing
- [Booking](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/booking/): the guest booking journey — 3D map, packages, add-ons, dynamic pricing, gift cards
- [Operations](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/operations/): floor plan, seating allocation, inventory sync, guest lists
- [Intelligence](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/intelligence/): guest data, 20+ reports, Meta/Google/GA4 attribution
- [Delivery](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/delivery/): five-stage rollout with a dedicated account lead and 90-day hypercare
- [Book a demo](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/book-a-demo/): a 15-minute demo configured around your venue — no monthly fee, and pricing built per venue is shared on the call
- [The Index (blog)](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/): operator playbooks on booking UX, revenue capture, and guest data

## Solutions

- [The beach club booking system Bali runs on](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/beach-club-booking-bali/): The beach club booking system Bali's flagship venues run on. Map booking, Midtrans payments, pre-paid daybeds — proven at FINNS. See it on your venue.
- [The beach club booking system Dubai's season demands](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/beach-club-booking-dubai/): Beach club booking system built for Dubai — map booking, prepaid packages, multi-currency guests. See how premium venues pre-sell the season.
- [The beach club booking system to sign before Ibiza opens](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/beach-club-booking-ibiza/): A beach club booking system for Ibiza — VIP beds and minimum spends sold on a venue map, prepaid before opening week. Set up in the Jan–Apr window.
- [The beach club booking system for Mykonos' short, intense season](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/beach-club-booking-mykonos/): A beach club booking system for Mykonos — ultra-premium daybeds sold on a venue map, prepaid before the flight lands, in a season with no slow-day slack.
- [The beach club booking system built for Phuket's high season](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/beach-club-booking-phuket/): A beach club booking system built for Phuket — map-first daybed sales, multi-currency checkout, pre-paid weekends. Proven in Southeast Asia.
- [The beach club booking system that pre-sells your Saturday.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/beach-clubs/): The beach club booking system premium venues run — 3D map booking, packages, prepayment, guest data. See how FINNS pre-sells millions every month.
- [The day club booking system that sells Saturday on Wednesday.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/day-club-booking-system/): Map-based day club booking with tiered packages, bottle pre-sales, and prepayment. How premium day clubs and pool parties sell out before doors open.
- [Hotel pool booking software that puts the deck on the P&L.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/hotel-pool-booking/): Hotel sunbed and pool booking software the property owns — resident reservations on the folio, direct day passes, cabana upsells. Not a marketplace.
- [The nightclub table booking system that ends the DM-and-doorman era.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/nightclub-table-booking/): Sell VIP tables and bottle service before doors open. Map-based table booking with prepayment, packages, and guest data — built for the operator.
- [The sunbed booking system that sells your deck before sunrise.](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/solutions/sunbed-booking-system/): Sell every sunbed before the towels hit the deck. Map-based booking, prepayment, and guest data — why premium decks from Cannes to Mykonos pre-sell.

## Compare

- [The Book Tech Labs alternative that closes the revenue loop](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/compare/book-tech-labs-alternative/): Book Tech Labs vs Clubtech: two furniture-first booking engines compared — visual selection, prepayment, and the ads-revenue loop that separates them.
- [The Fourvenues alternative for venues that sell days, not just nights](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/compare/fourvenues-alternative/): Fourvenues runs the night: tickets, guest lists, promoters. Clubtech sells the day: furniture, packages, prepaid dayparts. Here's how to choose.
- [The Hoteligy alternative that sells your pool to guests you haven't met yet](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/compare/hoteligy-alternative/): Hoteligy digitizes the pool for guests already checked in. Clubtech turns the same deck into an outside-guest revenue channel. Here's the difference.
- [The ResortPass alternative: own the day-pass channel instead of renting it](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/compare/resortpass-alternative/): Looking for a ResortPass alternative? Sell hotel day passes on your own domain — your pricing, your guest data, no marketplace cut. See how it works.
- [The serVme alternative for venues where the deck is the product](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/compare/servme-alternative/): Looking for a serVme alternative for a beach or day club? Where serVme fits, where furniture-first venues outgrow it, and how Clubtech compares.
- [The SevenRooms alternative for venues that sell furniture, not covers](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/compare/sevenrooms-alternative/): The SevenRooms alternative built for furniture, zones, and dayparts — not covers. See what breaks in a dining model, and where SevenRooms still wins.
- [The UrVenue alternative for beach clubs, day clubs, and independent venues](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/compare/urvenue-alternative/): Looking for a UrVenue alternative? Where UrVenue fits, where it doesn't, and how Clubtech compares for beach clubs, day clubs, and independent venues.

## Blog entries

- [How to reduce beach club no-shows: make guests commit before they arrive](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/the-hidden-revenue-leak-in-your-beach-club-booking-flow/): How to reduce beach club no-shows: take payment at booking. Deposits and prepaid packages turn intentions into commitments — here's the math.
- [The big-match playbook: turning major events into your best revenue weekend](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/big-match-playbook-major-events-revenue/): A World Cup final, a title fight, a Grand Prix weekend — a marquee event fills your venue whether you plan for it or not. The question is whether the demand lands as pre-sold revenue or walk-up guesswork.
- [Meta Conversions API for venue bookings: the operator's guide](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/meta-conversions-api-for-venue-bookings/): Meta Conversions API for bookings, explained for venue operators — why pixel attribution broke, what CAPI sends, and what changes in your ad results.
- [GA4 for venue bookings: measure the deck, not the pageviews](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/ga4-for-venue-bookings/): GA4 for venue bookings, explained for operators — the event model, booker audiences, and GM reports, plus why your GA4 numbers never match the books.
- [FINNS Beach Club revenue: from on-the-day chaos to a pre-paid engine](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/finns-beach-club-case-study/): How FINNS Beach Club revenue went from on-the-day chaos to millions in pre-paid bookings monthly — the exact booking mechanics, from Clubtech.
- [Dynamic pricing for beach clubs: your daybeds are airline seats with sunscreen](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/dynamic-pricing-for-beach-clubs/): Beach club pricing strategy, from the online-vs-door spread to full dynamic pricing: demand signals, tier ladders, and guardrails that keep trust.
- [How to increase beach club revenue: the operator's playbook](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/beach-club-revenue-playbook/): How to increase beach club revenue: the full stack from entry fees to minimum spends, plus the pricing moves that pre-sell your venue days ahead.
- [Beach club marketing strategy: the operator's guide for 2026](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/beach-club-marketing-strategy/): Beach club marketing strategy for operators — the bookings-first ads loop, first-party data, and the five numbers a GM should watch every week.
- [The complete guide to choosing a beach club booking system](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/beach-club-booking-system-complete-guide/): What a beach club booking system does, what to pay for, and the 12 questions to ask any vendor — the complete operator's guide to pre-selling your venue.
- [That Last Click Before Checkout Could Be Worth Thousands](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/that-last-click-before-checkout-could-be-worth-thousands/): Clubtech turns the final seconds before checkout into a high-intent revenue moment with context-aware upsells built directly into the booking flow.
- [The UX Behind a Sold-Out Saturday](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/the-ux-behind-a-sold-out-saturday/): Discover how smarter booking UX drives real revenue. Top venues lift mobile conversions, pre-arrival spend, and guaranteed deposits — all by fixing how guests move through the flow.
- [Your Guests Want to Spend More, You're Just Not Letting Them](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/your-guests-want-to-spend-more-youre-just-not-letting-them/): Stop leaving money on the table. Smart upsells turn your booking flow into a profit engine guests actually enjoy — pre-arrival, in-flow, and frictionless.
- [Maximize Beach Club Revenue: The Power of Pre-Booked Upsells](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/maximize-beach-club-revenue-the-power-of-pre-booked-upsells/): Pre-booked upsells unlock new revenue, smoother operations, and stronger guest satisfaction. Why presenting add-ons during the booking flow — not on arrival — changes the math.
- [Why First-Party Data is the Future of Beach Club Marketing](https://www.clubtechglobal.com/blog/why-first-party-data-is-the-future-of-beach-club-marketing/): Third-party cookies are dying. First-party data — collected directly with consent — is the foundation of personalized, compliant, profitable marketing for beach clubs.
